title: Auditooor Vault Note Layer Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for vault notes per the 5-layer ontology (L0-L4). Lane 11 of MCP harness review (PR #658). L0=raw artifacts, L1=structural patterns, L2=causal case studies, L3=attacker mental frames, L4=meta-discipline rules.

source_uri.description: L0 only: source URI (file path, git commit, web URL)

extracted_at.description: L0 only: when the artifact was extracted

verbatim.description: L0 only: true if note content is verbatim copy of source

pattern_id.description: L1 only: detector / DSL rule pattern ID

links_to_l2.description: L1 only: list of L2 case study refs (must have ≥1 OR links_to_l0)

links_to_l0.description: L1 only: list of L0 PoC/source refs

engagement.description: L2 only: engagement slug (spark, dydx, base_azul)

severity.description: L2 only: severity of associated finding

root_cause_class.description: L2 only: bug class (missing_validation, reentrancy, oracle_manipulation, etc.)

derived_pattern_ids.description: L2 only: L1 pattern IDs derived from this case study

frame_id.description: L3 only: attacker mental frame ID (AMF-001..AMF-NNN)

applicable_classes.description: L3 only: bug classes / protocol classes the frame applies to

case_studies.description: L3 only: ≥2 L2 case studies grounding this frame (frames are derived, not invented)

detectors.description: L3 only: related L1 detector IDs

rule_id.description: L4 only: discipline rule ID (L1..L32, Rule 1..7, L29-Disc-1..6)

triggers.description: L4 only: task_type or surface_keyword triggers for the dispatcher to route this rule
